name: Camino Minerals Corporation
summary: Camino Minerals Corporation, an exploration stage company, engages in the exploration and development of mineral properties primarily in Peru. The company explores for copper, gold, and silver deposits. It owns 100% interests in the Plata Dorada project, which consists of 6 claims covering an area of 2,100 hectares located in Cuzco, Peru; and the Los Chapitos property that consists of 39 claims covering an area of 22,500 hectares located in department of Arequipa, Peru. Camino Minerals Corporation was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
